creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi again,

I configured icingaweb2 and it works fine.

I'm using it with a postgresql backend so I have disabled the mysql option, and it works fine.

The configuration wizard shows a warning stating there is no MySQL driver so the mysql support will not be available in my installation, but, apart from this technically correct warning, I noticed no ill effect, so the patch should work as expected.
